---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kylewodehouse/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kylecapybara
    - icon: file-text
      text: CV
      href: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iqhtk9V-JPMp2jUO_E4yxAWUEkbrMIHj/view?usp=sharing
---

I'm a 3rd year undergraduate chemical engineering student at the University of Delaware, originally from the Reading, PA area. I work with Professor Arthi Jayaraman's lab at UD and also work as R&D co-op at DuPont Water. I love math/statistics and polymers, and hope to pursue a PhD in chemical engineering with a focus on polymer physics and machine learning starting in the fall of 2027. 

curated resources
1. fantastic writeup about diverging color maps for use in scientific visualizations: https://www.kennethmoreland.com/color-maps/
